post.description: Cancels one specific billing document in the system, which the consumer specifies by passing the billing document number. To cancel multiple billing documents simultaneously, use a batch request.

get.summary: Retrieves a specific billing document in PDF format.
get.description: Retrieves a specific billing document from the system in PDF format, which shows how the billing document looks after it has been output to PDF. Consumer must specify the billing document number.

parameters.name: BillingDocument
parameters.description: String value needs to be enclosed in single quotes

post.summary: Completes one specific pro forma invoice.
post.description: Completes one specific pro forma invoice in the system, which the consumer specifies by passing the billing document number. To complete multiple pro forma invoices simultaneously, use a batch request.

Group multiple requests into a single request payload, see [Batch Processing (OData Version 2.0)](https://www.odata.org/documentation/odata-version-2-0/batch-processing/).

*Please note that "Try it out" is not supported for this request.*

multipart/mixed;boundary=request-separat.example:
--request-separator
Content-Type: application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary

GET A_BillingDocument HTTP/1.1
Accept: application/json


--request-separator--

multipart/mixed.example:
--response-separator
Content-Type: application/http

HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Content-Type: application/json

{...}
--response-separator--

ConditionCategory.title: Condition Category (Examples: Tax, Freight, Price, Cost)

IsRelevantForAccrual.title: Condition is Relevant for Accrual  (e.g. Freight)

CreatedByUser.title: Name of Person Responsible for Creating the Object

PlantRegion.title: Region in which plant is located

PlantCounty.title: County in which plant is located

PlantCity.title: City in which plant is located

BillingDocumentItemText.title: Short text for sales order item

ServicesRenderedDate.title: Date on which services are rendered

BillingQuantityInBaseUnit.title: Billing quantity in stock keeping unit

MRPRequiredQuantityInBaseUnit.title: Required quantity for mat.management in stockkeeping units

BillingToBaseQuantityDnmntr.title: Denominator (divisor) for conversion of sales Qty into SKU

BillingToBaseQuantityNmrtr.title: Numerator (factor) for conversion of sales quantity into SKU

BillingPlan.title: Billing Plan Number / Invoicing Plan Number

BillingPlanItem.title: Item for billing plan/invoice plan/payment cards

NetAmount.title: Net Value of Billing item in Document Currency

GrossAmount.title: Gross Value of the Billing Item in Document Currency

PricingDate.title: Date for Pricing and Exchange Rate

AbsltPriceDetnExchangeRate.title: Absolute exchange rate for price determination

PriceDetnExchRateIsIndrctQtan.title: Pricing exchange rate quotation is indirect

PricingScaleQuantityInBaseUnit.title: Scale Quantity in base unit of measure

Subtotal1Amount.title: Subtotal 1 from Pricing Procedure for Price Element

Subtotal2Amount.title: Subtotal 2 from Pricing Procedure for Price Element
